name: Munjal Auto Industries Limited
summary: Munjal Auto Industries Limited manufactures and sells various parts and accessories for motor vehicles in India. The company operates through Auto Components and Composite Products & Moulds. It offers exhaust systems, steel wheel rims, and spoke wheel rims for two-three wheelers, three-wheelers, and passenger cars; and fuel tank assemblies, seat structure systems, and other products for four-wheelers, as well as sheet metal and tubular welded components. The company serves automotive, renewable energy, aerospace, defense, space, railways, and other engineering sectors. The company was incorporated in 1985 and is based in Gurugram, India. Munjal Auto Industries Limited is a subsidiary of Thakurdevi Investments Private Limited.
